what_went_well: PHPStan level 8 passes with zero errors
PHP CS Fixer passes with zero violations
Migration applied successfully to both dev and test databases
All core implementation tasks completed: entity, repository, syncer, controller, security, admin UI, docs
Interface extracted for AgentPublicEndpointRepository to enable unit testing
Followed existing codebase patterns (DBAL raw SQL, no ORM, interface-based DI)
what_went_wrong: Initial implementation used concrete class in constructor injection; had to extract AgentPublicEndpointRepositoryInterface to allow mocking in unit tests
improvement_suggestions: E2E tests (5.12, 5.13) for admin UI public endpoints section require a running Docker stack — not implemented in this pass
Task 5.7 (live proxy to telegram-channel-agent) requires a running agent — not implemented in this pass
Task 6.2 (verify Telegram webhook delivery) requires live Telegram integration — out of scope for this implementation pass
Consider adding Redis cache for endpoint lookups if DB query latency becomes a concern at scale
deviations_from_spec: Created AgentPublicEndpointSyncer as a dedicated service instead of modifying AgentCardFetcher directly — cleaner separation of concerns, same behavior
Extracted AgentPublicEndpointRepositoryInterface (not in original spec) to follow existing codebase patterns and enable unit testing
